word: G2568 - Καλοὶ Λιμένες - Kaloì Liménes - kal-oy' lee-men'-es - Fair havens

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ΚαλοὶΛιμένες

- Transliteration: Kaloi Limenes

- Phonetic: kal-oy' lee-men'-es

- Definition: Fair Havens = "goodly ports"

1. a bay of Crete, near the city Lasaea, so called because it had a good harbour

- Origin: plural of G2570 and G3040

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Plural of G2570 and G3040; good Harbors that is Fairhaven a bay of Crete: - fair havens.
